candidates.why: Generic operating depreciation appears as a separate line item at the same level as other operating cost buckets, but it is not labelled as related to cost of materials / COGS. Relative to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of Materials'), this does not clearly represent COGS-specific D&A to add to COGS.
Listed in the excerpt but with no visible values and no indication that it belongs to COGS. Not a clear separate COGS D&A row to add to the selected 'Cost of Materials' bucket.
Listed in the excerpt but with no visible values and no indication that it belongs to COGS. Not a clear separate COGS D&A row to add to the selected 'Cost of Materials' bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Cost of Materials'. No row explicitly indicates depreciation/amortisation in COGS / cost of sales / cost of revenues. To avoid double counting and misallocation, do not add any separate COGS D&A row.

candidates.why: A separate operating 'Depreciation' line appears above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows ('Payroll Expenses' and 'Other operational expenses'). Since no full SG&A total row was selected and this depreciation is presented as a separate same-level operating expense, it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in those selected XSGA rows.
Appears in the excerpt but with no visible values, and no evidence it is a populated separate operating row to add. Also no clearer summary D&A total is shown including it.
Appears in the excerpt but with no visible values, and no evidence it is a populated separate operating row to add. Also no clearer summary D&A total is shown including it.

variables.notes: OK. Relative to the selected XSGA bucket ('Payroll Expenses' + 'Other operational expenses'), 'Depreciation' is presented as a separate operating line before EBIT, so it should be added separately later. No dedicated R&D row is selected, so the special R&D exclusion does not apply. Blank amortization rows are not selected.
